# Demo Seed Phase

This demo illustrates the **expected artifact set** and structure for a completed or near-completed seed phase.

**Synthetic** — not a live person or Record. Safe to copy shape only.

Validate (strict):

```bash
pip install jsonschema
python3 scripts/validate-seed-phase.py users/demo/seed-phase
```

See [docs/seed-phase.md](../../../docs/seed-phase.md).
